title: Were Neanderthals Culturally Modern Humans? - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich on whether Neanderthals exhibited traits of cultural modernity. The conversation explores archaeological and genetic evidence regarding Neanderthal cognitive and social capabilities.
